title: Transformed Storage
description: A server/client modpack focused on improved  and easy to use storage mods for Fabric 1.21.5 & 1.21.8.  Also included Terralith and a few QOL and Optimizations mods for better client/server performance.
body:
![Transformed Storage Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcb399abe40ff5d44a82c71a84546f6a0cbdcdf2_0.webp)

**Transformed Storage** is a performance-enhanced client/server vanilla+ modpack for Fabric 1.21.5 & 1.21.8, it's built around modernized bulk storage, quality-of-life tweaks, and stunning world generation. Whether you're an expert builder, explorer, or inventory maniac, this pack is designed to keep your world organized and running smoothly.

- **Smart, Scalable Storage**

Build your ultimate storage network with Tom’s Simple Storage, Storage Drawers, and Reinforced Chests/Barrels/Shulker Boxes.  Automatically organize inventories with Inventory Profiles Next, Crafting Tweaks, and Mouse Tweaks!

- **Optimized Performance**

Silky smooth gameplay with Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, Krypton, EntityCulling, ImmediatelyFast, and more...

- **Enhanced World & Exploration**
 
Gorgeous biomes powered by the Terralith mod.  Xaero's Minimap and Xaero's World Map included to better navigate the world.  Nature’s Compass is a must to track down those hard to find biomes with ease.

- **Powerful Utilities & QoL**
 
Includes the excellent mod MiniHUD with a lot of awesome HUD options!  Also a few QOL mods to tweak a few things but still keep a vanilla feel.


**Additional Credits:**

Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net
